acc-bridge -> plan -> approve -> apply -> gate.decide pipeline
NATS + data-layer split + lease/graph partitioning form kazi's coordination architecture
Harness conformance contract applied outward then reflexively to kazi itself
Operator's /apply --pool workflow progressively internalized into kazi-native scheduling
Two-tier then adaptive cost-tiering policy, orchestrator-owned throughout
Predicate verification framework (custom_script -> envelope v2 -> enforcement -> catalog)

Declared-Verdict / Evidence-Tier Pattern Across Predicates
Envelope-v2 score/direction predicate family (property, ratchet, static)
acc-bridge -> plan -> approve -> apply -> gate.decide pipeline
NATS + data-layer split + lease/graph partitioning form kazi's coordination architecture
Harness conformance contract applied outward then reflexively to kazi itself
Operator's /apply --pool workflow progressively internalized into kazi-native scheduling
Two-tier then adaptive cost-tiering policy, orchestrator-owned throughout
Predicate verification framework (custom_script -> envelope v2 -> enforcement -> catalog)
Context/token economy program (context store, economy envelope, inner-harness minimalism, E19 benchmark)
Anti-gaming enforcement decision + verified implementation + docs
E32 Predicate-Verification Framework Keystones
Economy Accounting Feeds Context-Store + Inner-Harness Savings Reporting
Blog Series Reuses OSS Verb-Drift Guard + Prefigures Self-Maintaining Docs
